scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix ai-service install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix ai-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:lan:cleanup: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = 4000,5000,5173,5174; foreach ($port in $ports) { $listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($listener in $listeners) { try { Stop-Process -Id $listener.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {} } }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:lan: npm run dev:lan:cleanup && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix ai-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host"
scripts.audit: npm --prefix backend audit && npm --prefix ai-service audit && npm --prefix frontend audit
